headline: No urgent client decision is due right now.
subhead: Four active client lanes are visible. Two records need a fresh operating check before they should guide a new commitment.

attention.title: Nothing is asking for an immediate decision
attention.detail: Goff remains behind an internal review gate, Morgan has a dated renewal reminder, Rachel's new-scope gate is preserved, and Handy has no newly verified request for Jeff.
attention.action: Keep working from the current lanes; interrupt Jeff only if a promise, client wait, or release gate changes.

changes.title: Evidence provenance became the active procurement slice
changes.detail: The local pilot now preserves source evidence through the review packet. The repository test suite was re-run successfully on July 24.

changes.title: Dispatch overlap warnings were tightened
changes.detail: The latest recorded implementation work made grouped and untimed loads participate in the same overlap safety checks dispatchers see.

changes.title: The workflow boundary was consolidated
changes.detail: The current record keeps HCP unchanged unless Roger explicitly approves a new scope. This needs a fresh operating check before a new commitment.

changes.title: The pre-new-scope gate is explicit
changes.detail: The working photo-queue outcome must be closed out cordially with an Agency OS Review and written SAIOS closeout before another $5k engagement begins.

blazeWork.work: Finish procurement evidence review and prepare Jeff's internal walkthrough.
blazeWork.nextUpdate: After the safety review is complete

blazeWork.work: Preserve the working photo-queue outcome and prepare the closeout/review layer before any new scope.
Turn fragmented operating records into this persistent owner view without publishing client-sensitive detail.

waitingRooms.label: Waiting on Jeff
waitingRooms.detail: No verified decision or communication is due today.

waitingRooms.label: Waiting on client
waitingRooms.detail: Morgan's next-improvement review remains with Roger in the latest durable record.

waitingRooms.label: Waiting on Blaze
waitingRooms.detail: Goff review, Rachel closeout preparation, and Command Center delivery.

waitingRooms.label: Needs fresh evidence
waitingRooms.detail: Handy and Morgan require operating reconciliation before new commitments are treated as current.

clients.name: Goff Welding
clients.outcome: Prove a safe, auditable procurement-intake workflow before any production integration.
clients.nextMilestone: Jeff walkthrough after independent safety review
clients.nextContact: After the internal walkthrough is ready
clients.jeffAction: None now. Review the realistic walkthrough before any Goff operator is invited.
clients.risk: Do not schedule operators or make production writes before the reviewed slice is ready.
clients.decision: Keep the pilot local and evidence-led; production ownership and SAP integration remain outside this slice.
sources: goff-procurement-intake · current branch and passing test suite

clients.name: Handy Truck Lines
clients.outcome: Keep the live dispatch system reliable while preserving dispatcher judgment.
clients.nextMilestone: Reconcile the current production priority with Jeff and dispatcher feedback
clients.jeffAction: No immediate task. Confirm the next priority before Blaze starts an unrelated lane.
clients.risk: The repository is active production, but the Command Center's client control record is older than the code evidence.
clients.decision: Warnings should support dispatcher judgment rather than hard-blocking legitimate exceptions.

clients.name: Morgan Door
clients.outcome: Improve workflow visibility without silently changing Morgan's HCP operating system.
clients.nextMilestone: Roger confirms which next improvement, if any, should become active
clients.nextContact: Renewal conversation reminder set for October 15
clients.jeffAction: None today. Do not promise HCP changes or a new build before Roger chooses the next lane.
clients.risk: The latest durable operating record was consolidated June 16 and should be refreshed before it drives new work.
clients.decision: HCP stays unchanged unless Roger explicitly approves new scope.

clients.name: Rachel Hansen Agency
clients.outcome: Close the working photo-queue engagement cleanly before opening another paid priority.
clients.lane: Photo queue continuity and engagement closeout
clients.nextMilestone: Agency OS Review and written SAIOS closeout
clients.nextContact: When the closeout package is ready for Jeff's review
clients.jeffAction: No immediate task. Do not begin another $5k workstream before reviewing the closeout.
clients.risk: A useful working workflow can still create scope confusion if delivered value and the next engagement are not separated.
clients.decision: No new $5k work until a cordial portal recap, Agency OS Review, and written SAIOS closeout are complete.

decisions.statement: Internal walkthrough and safety review come before operator validation or production writes.
Warn dispatchers about exceptions; do not replace their judgment with new hard blocks without approval.
Do not change HCP unless Roger explicitly approves that scope.
Close out the current engagement in writing before starting another $5k workstream.
